productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Core Shoulder Black Bags
description: The Core Shoulder bag from puma is your new best friend! Superbly practical and perfectly organised with ample space for all your girlie needs, this bag is high on style and use. Height: 43 cm Made of 100% polyamide One main chamber with a two-way zipper One zippered chamber inside the main chamber with an iPod and mobile case Fabric straps for handling ease and durability One front pocket with velcro fastener Padded straps for handling ease and to distribute weight evenly across the shoulders puma cat logo printed on the front Care only hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Line dry Do not iron
